meta.title: Laak — Your Money. Your Rules. Your Device.
meta.description: The investment portfolio tracker that keeps your financial data exactly where it belongs — with you. Private, offline-first, with built-in compliance screening.
hero.subtitle: Investment portfolio tracker. Private. Offline. On your phone.
features.heading: EVERYTHING YOU NEED.

features.items.title: Portfolio at a Glance
features.items.description: What you own, how it's performing, where it's allocated. Clear layout, not a spreadsheet.

features.items.title: Offline-First
features.items.description: Works without internet. Designed for the real world, not just fast Wi-Fi.

features.items.title: Halal Screening
features.items.description: Know where every stock stands. Screening data from trusted sources, explained in plain language.

features.items.title: AI Without Opinions
features.items.description: Ask in plain language. Get facts and sources — never recommendations.

privacy.subtitle: Your financial data stays on your device. You control when to back it up.

privacy.pillars.title: On-Device Storage
privacy.pillars.description: All portfolio data stays on your phone — no cloud, no servers.

privacy.pillars.title: Biometric Lock
privacy.pillars.description: Face ID or fingerprint to open. Nothing leaves the device without you.

privacy.pillars.title: Anonymous by Default
privacy.pillars.description: No email, no account, no sign-up. Your data lives on your device — you choose if and when to back it up.

howItWorks.heading: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.subtitle: Three steps. That's it.

howItWorks.steps.title: Add your holdings
howItWorks.steps.description: Search any supported market. Add investments in seconds.

howItWorks.steps.title: See the full picture
howItWorks.steps.description: Performance, allocation, and trends — all in one view.

howItWorks.steps.title: Check compliance
howItWorks.steps.description: Compliance screening data from trusted sources, clearly explained.

faq.heading: Questions?
faq.subtitle: Here are the ones we get most.

faq.items.question: Is Laak a financial advisor?
faq.items.answer: No. Laak is a calculator, translator, and reporter. It shows you data from trusted sources and helps you understand your portfolio — it never tells you what to buy or sell.

faq.items.question: How does compliance screening work?
faq.items.answer: Laak aggregates screening data from recognized sources like AAOIFI standards and established screening providers. It presents compliance status clearly, with explanations — but the final judgment is always yours. Screening is an optional feature you can enable based on your investment criteria.

faq.items.question: Where is my data stored?
faq.items.answer: On your device. Laak is offline-first by design. Your portfolio data never leaves your phone unless you explicitly choose to sync it (encrypted, to your own cloud backup).

faq.items.question: Do I need to create an account?
faq.items.answer: No email, no password, no personal info required. Just open the app and start tracking. Biometric lock keeps your data secure.

faq.items.question: Which markets does Laak support?
faq.items.answer: We're starting with the Egyptian Exchange (EGX), expanding to Saudi (Tadawul) and GCC markets, then Malaysia and Southeast Asia. About 620 stocks total across these markets.

faq.items.question: Does it work without internet?
faq.items.answer: Yes. Laak is designed for unreliable connectivity. You can view your portfolio, check screening status, and explore your data fully offline. Market prices update when you're back online.

faq.items.question: Is Laak free?
faq.items.answer: The core experience — portfolio tracking, basic screening, and offline access — is free. Premium features like AI-powered analysis, advanced screening details, and multi-market support will be available through a subscription.

footer.subtitle: Track your investment portfolio with full privacy. No account needed.
